meta.project: WearWise Vietnam Clothing Shops Mock API
meta.description: Mock clothing-shop data for Android Google Maps integration.
meta.note: All shop names, phone numbers, Shopee links and products are fictional. Addresses and coordinates are approximate mock data for demo/testing. Cleaned to 25 shops per province and checked with basic land/region coordinate bounds.
meta.coordinateCleaningNote: Adjusted suspected Da Nang river/sea coordinates using approximate land-safe district anchors; no shops were deleted.
